description: An invoice fails the 3-way match because the quantity invoiced is greater than the quantity received on the goods receipt note.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically places the invoice on hold due to a quantity mismatch.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is notified of the hold and the reason.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the PO, invoice, and goods receipt note to confirm the discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the PO was for 100 units, 90 were received, but 100 were invoiced.

nodes.task_description: Contact the warehouse to confirm if the remaining 10 units have since been received.

expected_outcome.value: The warehouse confirms the remaining items have not arrived.

nodes.task_description: Inform the vendor of the quantity discrepancy and request a new invoice for the quantity actually received.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts the vendor and asks them to submit a corrected invoice for 90 units.
